cfg.dynamic_buy_pricing.name: Dynamic Buy Pricing
cfg.dynamic_buy_pricing.desc: When on, buy prices rise as shops run low on an item. When off, every purchase is at the flat base price.
cfg.buy_price_multiplier.name: Buy Price Multiplier
cfg.buy_price_multiplier.desc: Final multiplier on every buy price. 1.0 = base, 0.5 = half, 2.0 = double.
cfg.dynamic_sell_pricing.name: Dynamic Sell Pricing
cfg.dynamic_sell_pricing.desc: When on, sell prices drop as shops fill up. When off, every sale pays the flat sell price.
cfg.sell_price_multiplier.name: Sell Price Multiplier
cfg.sell_price_multiplier.desc: Final multiplier on every sell price. 0.75 matches base game.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
